title: Wavey Pack
description: Makes Leaves, Flowers, Grass, & Water Wavey (Vanilla Only)
body:
## 🌿 Wavey Pack – Bring Life to Your World (Java Edition)

**Wavey Pack** is a lightweight **vanilla-style** resource pack for **Minecraft Java Edition** that makes **Leaves, Flowers, Grass, and Water wave gently** — giving your world a calm and natural movement effect.
It keeps the original Minecraft textures and only adds animation, making your gameplay feel beautiful and more alive.

---

### ✨ Features

* 🌳 Wavey **Leaves** on all trees
* 🌾 Soft movement for **Grass & Tall Grass**
* 🌺 Subtle animation on **Flowers**
* 💧 Calm wave effect on **Water**
* 🎮 100% **vanilla look** preserved
* 🧊 Works without shaders
* 🔋 FPS-friendly on most systems

---

### ⚠️ Compatibility Notice

This pack **does not** work on:

| Not Supported | Reason                                                   |
| ------------- | -------------------------------------------------------- |
| Sodium        | Replaces block rendering / lacks wavey animation support |
| OptiFine      | Conflicts with custom vertex animation method            |

✅ Works best on **pure Vanilla Java** or with **clients/mod loaders that do not override block animations**.

✅ Works in both singleplayer & multiplayer (client-side only)

❌ Does not work on Bedrock / MCPE

---

### ✅ Performance

The pack is **very lightweight** as it only animates existing vanilla textures — no models or high-res files.
If your system can run vanilla, it can run this.

---
